control.description-key: LeanToolKit meeting setup wizard — steps a maker through creating a meeting: title, purpose and owner; site / department / area from a supplied picklist tree; cadence; crews and roster; participants with crew linkage; meeting record columns; review. Emits a complete MeetingScheduler settings blob on Output and stamps Submitted At when Create meeting is pressed. A setup screen, not a board card.

property.name: inputJSON
property.description-key: An existing MeetingScheduler settings blob to edit. Empty = set up a new meeting. Keys the wizard does not manage (theme, prompts, board) are preserved verbatim.

property.name: peopleJSON
property.description-key: The roster to pick the owner and participants from: [{whoId, who, crew}]. People can also be added by name for participants outside the roster.

property.name: orgJSON
property.description-key: The site / department / area picklist tree: [{site, departments:[{department, areas:[...]}]}]. Areas may be empty (area optional). Empty input falls back to free-text organisation fields.

property.name: resetTrigger
property.description-key: Reloads Input JSON whenever this VALUE changes, e.g. Set(varReset, Text(Now())). Change-of-value, not boolean.

property.name: outputJSON
property.description-key: The composed MeetingScheduler settings blob: {cardType, title, config:{category, daysOfWeek, timeOfDay, daysPrior, crewList, rosterPattern, baseStartDate, weekTopics, dayTopics, columns}, meeting:{purpose, owner, org:{site,department,area}, participants}}. baseStartDate anchors rostered AND anchored cadences (fortnightly week parity, monthly/quarterly/annually nth weekday); weekTopics is the weekly topic rotation through the month; dayTopics keys daily/shiftly topics by weekday. Emitted live as the maker edits.

property.name: submittedAt
property.description-key: Timestamp stamped when Create meeting is pressed on the Review step — changes every press, so OnChange can create the board and scheduler card exactly once per submit.

property.name: cardTitle
property.description-key: Optional title bar above the wizard (e.g. New meeting). Leave empty for no chrome.

property.name: prompts
property.description-key: Optional coaching text shown as an info popover on the title bar: plain text or a JSON array of strings.

property.name: backgroundColor
property.description-key: Form background colour (any CSS colour or hex). Default white.

property.name: foregroundColor
property.description-key: Text / line colour. Default rich black.

property.name: accentColor
property.description-key: Step markers, toggles and the primary buttons. Default rich black.

property.name: titleBarColor
property.description-key: Background fill for just the title bar, distinct from the card background - use one colour across related cards to visually associate them on a board. Empty = no strip fill.

property.name: fontFamily
property.description-key: Font family (or comma-separated font stack) for the form.

property.name: readOnly
property.description-key: When true, the wizard is display-only: fields disabled, Create meeting disabled.
